title: centaurea littorea
intro: Centaurea littorea, also known as Sea Knapweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the coastal areas of Western Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea littorea include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to exhibit antioxidant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and promote tissue repair.
